TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Chris Anstey == siwkay nizaňź nalecuh ciniza i Melbourne, Victoria, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Chris Anstey i 1997 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 18, namapili' tu nu Portland Trail Blazers putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 1 a bulad 1 a demiad, 1975 a mihcaan, Chris Anstey, miunduay. tatama u etul niza, i mali putiput a pueneng kakitizaan sa i tebanay . talakway a tademaw ciniza, izaw 213 kungfeng atu 115 kungcin. sikapahay a uzip niza, sisa namapili nu putiput i sakacacay ku uwac. kya syubay putiput sa ku Portland Trail Blazers.
S.PHON: == ¶ńßris anst…ô == siwkaj niza* nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß ¶iniza i m…ôr~…ĺbourn…ô, *i ¶toria, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, pańßanńßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶ńßris anst…ô i **** a mińß ¶an nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu portr~…ĺand trair~…ĺ br~…ĺaz…ôrs putiput. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶iniza i * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶ńßris anst…ô, miunduaj. tatama u …ôtur~…ĺ niza, i mar~…ĺi putiput a pu…ôn…ôŇč kakitizaan sa i t…ôbanaj . tar~…ĺakwaj a tad…ômaw ¶iniza, izaw *** kuŇčf…ôŇč atu *** kuŇč ¶in. sikapańßaj a uzip niza, sisa namapir~…ĺi nu putiput i saka ¶a ¶aj ku uwa ¶. kja sjubaj putiput sa ku portr~…ĺand trair~…ĺ br~…ĺaz…ôrs.
S.FORM: == Chris Anstey == siwkay nizaňź nalecuh ciniza i Melbourne, Victoria, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Chris Anstey i 1997 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 18, namapili' tu nu Portland Trail Blazers putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 1 a bulad 1 a demiad, 1975 a mihcaan, Chris Anstey, miunduay. tatama u etul niza, i mali putiput a pueneng kakitizaan sa i tebanay . talakway a tademaw ciniza, izaw 213 kungfeng atu 115 kungcin. sikapahay a uzip niza, sisa namapili nu putiput i sakacacay ku uwac. kya syubay putiput sa ku Portland Trail Blazers.
S.PHON: == ¶ńßris anst…ô == siwkaj niza* nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß ¶iniza i m…ôr~…ĺbourn…ô, *i ¶toria, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, pańßanńßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶ńßris anst…ô i **** a mińß ¶an nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu portr~…ĺand trair~…ĺ br~…ĺaz…ôrs putiput. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶iniza i * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶ńßris anst…ô, miunduaj. tatama u …ôtur~…ĺ niza, i mar~…ĺi putiput a pu…ôn…ôŇč kakitizaan sa i t…ôbanaj . tar~…ĺakwaj a tad…ômaw ¶iniza, izaw *** kuŇčf…ôŇč atu *** kuŇč ¶in. sikapańßaj a uzip niza, sisa namapir~…ĺi nu putiput i saka ¶a ¶aj ku uwa ¶. kja sjubaj putiput sa ku portr~…ĺand trair~…ĺ br~…ĺaz…ôrs.
